summary: CodeQuest: ProgMaster - Comprehensive testing completed. Backend: 100% PASS (26/26 tests). Frontend: 95% PASS with minor timing issue in quiz navigation. All core features working: onboarding, dashboard, tabs, missions, shop, quizzes, pair programming, bug hunt. 4200 questions seeded. PT-BR interface. Cyberpunk theme applied.

integration_issues.issue: After clicking Quizzes tab, the quizzes-screen testID selector times out. This appears to be a timing/rendering delay issue. The screen does load (verified via screenshots) but the testID selector is not found within 5 seconds.

action_items: Investigate quiz screen testID selector timing issue - may need to add loading state or adjust selector strategy
Consider addressing deprecation warnings (textShadow*, Image.resizeMode) for future React Native compatibility
critical_code_review_comments: ✅ All MongoDB queries properly exclude _id field
✅ All API calls use environment variable EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL
✅ Proper async/await usage throughout backend and frontend
✅ All interactive elements have testID attributes for testing
✅ All text wrapped in React Native Text component
✅ All styles via StyleSheet.create() - no CSS files
✅ SafeAreaView used for proper mobile layout
✅ Good error handling with try-catch blocks
✅ Mobile-first design with proper spacing (8pt grid)
✅ Touch targets appear adequately sized for mobile
seed_data_creation: Backend auto-seeded 4200 questions on startup. Test user created during frontend testing with name 'TEST_PlaywrightUser' and wizard avatar.
context_for_next_testing_agent: App is fully functional. Only minor timing issue with quiz screen testID selector. All 26 backend API endpoints tested and passing. Frontend flows working including onboarding, dashboard, all 5 tabs, missions, shop, quizzes, pair programming, and bug hunt. Database has 4200 questions across 4 languages (C#, SQL, Python, Java). Screenshots captured in /app/test_reports/ for visual verification.

test_categories.user: 5/5 passed - Create, get, update, add XP, add coins
test_categories.questions: 4/4 passed - Counts, by language, random, categories
test_categories.quiz: 3/3 passed - Start quiz, submit answer, history
test_categories.shop: 3/3 passed - Get items, buy item, inventory

steps: Welcome screen loads with 'INICIAR AVENTURA' button
Character creation screen loads after button click

elements_verified: Player HUD with avatar, name, level, title
Stats row with CodeCoins (100), Streak (0), Acertos (0), Quizzes (0)
6 quick action buttons (Quiz, Pair Prog, Bug Hunt, Pomodoro, Entrevista, Dual Code)
Language progress cards for all 4 languages

quiz_flow.issue: testID selector timeout after tab navigation (timing issue)
quiz_flow.visual_verification: Screen loads correctly based on later screenshots

deprecation_warnings: textShadow* style props deprecated - use textShadow
shadow* style props deprecated - use boxShadow
